2026-03-13JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Regional Senior Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario for the Central East Region, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for OntarioAppointment of the Honourable Howard Leibovich, a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a Regional Senior Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario for the Central East Region, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Regional Senior Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario for the Central East Region, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario
precis: Appointment of the Honourable Howard Leibovich, a Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, to be a Regional Senior Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario for the Central East Region, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.
